MemberSignature.Value: public Azure.Developer.LoadTesting.RecurrenceEnd RecurrenceEnd { get; set; }
.property instance class Azure.Developer.LoadTesting.RecurrenceEnd RecurrenceEnd
Public Property RecurrenceEnd As RecurrenceEnd
member this.RecurrenceEnd : Azure.Developer.LoadTesting.RecurrenceEnd with get, set

Docs.summary: Recurrence end model. You can specify the end either by providing a numberOfOccurrences (which will end the recurrence after the specified number of occurrences) or by providing an endDateTime (which will end the recurrence after the specified date). If neither value is provided, the recurrence will continue until it is manually ended. However, if both values are provided, an error will be thrown.
